queries.question: Show me the issues each home inspection revealed.
queries.sql: SELECT Issues.issue_type  from Home_Inspection_Issues join Issues on Home_Inspection_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Home_Inspections on Home_Inspection_Issues.home_inspection_id = Home_Inspections.id   GROUP BY Home_Inspection_Issues.issue_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Home_Inspection_Issues.home_inspection_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Home_Inspections)

queries.question: Show me the issues each home inspection revealed.
queries.sql: select home_inspections.address , issues.issue_type from Home_Inspection_Issues join Issues on Home_Inspection_Issues.issue_id = Issues.id join Home_Inspections on Home_Inspection_Issues.home_inspection_id = Home_Inspections.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?address ?issue_type WHERE {
  ?home_inspection_issues a :Home_Inspection_Issues .
  ?issues a :Issues .
  ?home_inspection_issues p:hasIssues ?issues .
  ?home_inspections a :Home_Inspections .
  ?home_inspection_issues p:hasHome_Inspections ?home_inspections .
  ?home_inspections p:address ?address .
  ?issues p:issue_type ?issue_type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the issues each home inspection revealed.
